TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakilimad == Aw-tali-ya lyen-pang "Ing a kamu Commonwealth of Australia" ngangan Aw-ta-li-yalin, "Aw-cow Australia, nipasaadidi' tu silit AU,AUS", u tiniay i nutimulan pangkiw nu hekal nu saamisan, tu nuwalian pangkiw nu hekal tu nuwalian a tatengilan hungti ku pahecekay tu hulic, lyen-pang-ce a kanatal. hamin nu kanatal tungus nu Ta-yang-cow "cayay ku cacayay a cow", uyni cow ku tabakiay a hekal, nuwalian pangkiw nu hekal sakatus nu ahebal atu hamin nu hekal tu sakaenem nu tabakiay a kanatal. (Australia,ÁłģŚĮęÁāļAU,AUS), . Aw-co tiniay i Ta-lu i kasumamadan izaw ku tademaw mueneng mauzip, nika katukuh 17 a se-ci nu pabalungaay a ziday kya maazi makay likut mitules tu syakay a tademaw, 18 se-ci sazikuzay a mihcaan malingatu mala u midebungay nu Ing-kow atu pipaydangan a kitizaan nu malubuay, zikuz zayhan maazih ku siacaay a ba'tuan mala u mabulayay a tademaw, makakadum tu mahiniay a kawaw. keyzayan, miba'tu milungad tu sakasilacul, pahabay tu aadupen, pahabay tu micucu'ay aadipen, miliwkuay atu pasubana'ayay a kawaw uyni a kanatal ku hecek nu nilaculan, zuma "mikalic i kulul nu sizi" atu "muenge i kazizeng nu miba'tuay" u kamu nu kanatal. Aw-cow a Yincumi pasu tusa ku katuuday a binacadan, Aw-cu Ta-lu "atu pasu Ta-s-ma-ni-ya a subal ilabu ililis nu subal" a Yincumin atu Tuw-lye-s bayu a subal a Yincumin, u masazumaay a Me-la-ni-si-ya a tademaw kuheni, duduc tu piasip, Aw-cow-Taluay a tdemaw muenengay malingatu iayaw nu 5 emang katukuh 6.5 emang a mihcaan, itawya tademaw amin makay nu ayzaay a Tung-nan-ya miawas tu hekalay a sangaw atu pacena'ay i bayu a zaza malimad. imahini caay henay kapulita pinaay ku sabeleng nu malimaday nu tademaw hakay mala uyni nu ayzaay a ziday nu Aw-cow a tuas nu Yencumin. A-mu-tiay "Madjedbebe u pilimekan a ungcung nu Aw-co nu kasumamadanay a pihibangan nu tademaw. maazih ku nu sumamaday a ukuk nu tademaw, u mihcaan pakala tu ayaw nu 41000 a mihcaan. Madjedbebe 41000ŚĻīŚČć. hekal ŚúįÁźÜ Aw-cow tini i nutimulan pangkiw nu hekal, teban nu timul bayu atu In-tu a bayu, izaway ku nu Aw-cow talu atu Ta-s-ma-niya a kasasubal. Aw-cow u bayu amin ku taliyuk, sawali timul silaed tu Ta-s-man a bayu atu malabelaw tu Niw-si-lan, nuamisan silaed tu Ti-won bayu atu To-lye-s a bayu atu Tung-ti-won, masasupaewang ku In-tu-ni-si-ya atu Pa-pu-ya-sin-ci nye-ya. Aw-cow macalap ku Ta-yang-cow u tukus amin, pulung nu hekal 769.2 emang pin-bang kung-li. likelikenan atu pangkiw nu likelikenan u hekal katukuh 340 emang pin-bang kung-li, pulung nu hekal macalap ku 445% pesen. masaliyuk nu bay uku Ow-co, matelek ku tukus atu bayu, u tanayu' katukuh 36,735 kung-li. demiad satipan nu talakaway a buyu' atu tukusay a likeikenan tungusay u akuti'ay ku demkiad nu likelikenan, makedal caay kaudad, kaudad nu mihcaan 100-300 kung-li dada', saamisan tungusay u akuti'ay a nalinahuwan, kaudad nu mihcaan 1,000-2,300 kung-li, u sayadahay a kakitizaan nu hamin nu kanatal, uzuma tungusay u akuti'ay,nuwalian a sin-ing-lan a byu' u timul tungusay tatudungay a akuti' u kilakilang, u kaudad nu mihcaan 500~1,200 kung-li. palalecad tu akuti' nu paymicaan saamisan 27‚ĄÉ, nutimulan 14‚ĄÉ Aw-cow hatu mapangkiw ku makedalay anucaay u bukebukelalan, nika u hekal yadah ku mauzipay, pasu makay talakaway a apuyu'ay nu mulangaway katukuh caledesay a kilakilangan, hamin nu hekalay 17 ku micidekay nu mauzipay u sakayadahay a kanatal. Aw-cow itiza yadah ku mitekeday nu mauzipay, lalekalan nu kasumamadanay nu Aw-cu-ta-lu, hekalan mahiza muteneng tu, atu pihaceng ku kikasumad nu demiad. Aw-co nu timul pangkiw hekal a kyezay u samacakatay a kanatal, nu kitakit sacakatay a keyzay nu kanatal, 2023 a m ihcaan, Aw-cow a nipalumaan nipahabayan pulung nu aca pakala tu 1.7 emang ok'k ku kalisiw, palalecad tu nu tademaw a nipaluman nipahabayan u aca apakala tu 6,5 emang ku kalisiw. u Aw-cow sa i kitakit nu cacay a bataan u tabakiay a nikalukan nisanga'an a tuud patayza i nu tawan a kanatal, atu enem ku tabakiay a nisanga'an a apuk a ba'tu patahal i zumaan a kanatal. mapangangan tu "mikacaway i kulul nu sizi, mikacaw i miba'tuay a kazizengan, mikec ku lima tu habayay a kanatal". Aw-co a gingku, bisiwbayay, atu miedapay kalamlam satu macakat. namahini, Aow-co nu miliwkuay a kawaw u saayaway i hamin nu kitakit u sakatulu nu nilaculan nu sakahenulan nunisakaputay, miliwkuay a kawaw i Aw-cow kalamkam sa macakat. zayhan salungan ku lalayan hekal atu sakasilacul tu kasatiman a aadupen atu mulangaway, cunus tu kacakat nu keyzay, Aw-cow mala u cayay kapawan a katayzan nu miliwkuay. angangan a piliwkuan izaw ku piazihan tu misaigiay mudadiway nu Sye-li. Sye-li a minatu tabakiay a sangaw, Sye-li a picekulan "timul pangkiw nu hekal nu sakatusa nu talakaway a nipatizeng" kim a dadipasan, Ta-paw-cyaw, saamisan Ay-al a taku, Mu-al-pen a piazihan tu nalimaan, u lalekalan nu Yencumin a lala' Ka-ka-tu aiidangan nu kanatal atu lalangawan nu Yencumin Wi-lan-ci a tukuan. Aw-cow nu salengacay a tademaw u tuas sa 19,20 se-ciay nu malimaday nu Ing-kow. katuud ku makay zumaay a kanatal, Aw-cow atu Ameylika malecad nu makay zumaay a kanatal nu malimaday a tademaw palalecad hatu pinaay a kanatal, u sakatuuday nu malimaday nu kitakit. . lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Aw-cow mililid nu zumaay a hekal, hina amadayum mapatelac mala likelikenan a lalangawan, saca u Aw-cow haymaw sa tu itizaay a kanatal u piliyas nu Ing-kow, imahini u Aw-cow micukelay tu lalangawan maka 1960 a mihcaan nu tahekal, mahicahicaay analimaan, nisultan dadiw atu kacudu lalangawan atu micukel tu lalangawan mitules tu kitakit, Aw-cow a lalangawan nu Yencumin atu micukelay nu Ow-cow a iluc nu salengacay a tademaw malecad tu ku lalangawan, i zuma a kitizaan masa "lalangawan nu Aw-cow".
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺimad == aw-tar~…ĺi-ja r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč "iŇč a kamu ¶ommonw…ôar~…ĺtńß of austrar~…ĺia" ŇčaŇčan aw-ta-r~…ĺi-jar~…ĺin, "aw- ¶ow austrar~…ĺia, nipasaadidi Ē~ ° tu sir~…ĺit au,aus", u tiniaj i nutimur~…ĺan paŇčkiw nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu saamisan, tu nuwar~…ĺian paŇčkiw nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ tu nuwar~…ĺian a tat…ôŇčir~…ĺan ńßuŇčti ku pańß…ô ¶…ôkaj tu ńßur~…ĺi ¶, r~…ĺj…ôn-paŇč- ¶…ô a kanatar~…ĺ. ńßamin nu kanatar~…ĺ tuŇčus nu ta-jaŇč- ¶ow " ¶ajaj ku ¶a ¶ajaj a ¶ow", ujni ¶ow ku tabakiaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, nuwar~…ĺian paŇčkiw nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ sakatus nu ańß…ôbar~…ĺ atu ńßamin nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ tu saka…ôn…ôm nu tabakiaj a kanatar~…ĺ. (austrar~…ĺia,***au,aus), . aw- ¶o tiniaj i ta-r~…ĺu i kasumamadan izaw ku tad…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇč mauzip, nika katukuńß ** a s…ô- ¶i nu pabar~…ĺuŇčaaj a zidaj kja maazi makaj r~…ĺikut mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu sjakaj a tad…ômaw, ** s…ô- ¶i sazikuzaj a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺa u mid…ôbuŇčaj nu iŇč-kow atu pipajdaŇčan a kitizaan nu mar~…ĺubuaj, zikuz zajńßan maazińß ku sia ¶aaj a ba Ē~ °tuan mar~…ĺa u mabur~…ĺajaj a tad…ômaw, makakadum tu mańßiniaj a kawaw. k…ôzajan, miba Ē~ °tu mir~…ĺuŇčad tu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ, pańßabaj tu aadup…ôn, pańßabaj tu mi ¶u ¶u Ē~ °aj aadip…ôn, mir~…ĺiwkuaj atu pasubana Ē~ °ajaj a kawaw ujni a kanatar~…ĺ ku ńß…ô ¶…ôk nu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan, zuma "mikar~…ĺi ¶ i kur~…ĺur~…ĺ nu sizi" atu "mu…ôŇč…ô i kaziz…ôŇč nu miba Ē~ °tuaj" u kamu nu kanatar~…ĺ. aw- ¶ow a jin ¶umi pasu tusa ku katuudaj a bina ¶adan, aw- ¶u ta-r~…ĺu "atu pasu ta-s-ma-ni-ja a subar~…ĺ ir~…ĺabu ir~…ĺir~…ĺis nu subar~…ĺ" a jin ¶umin atu tuw-r~…ĺj…ô-s baju a subar~…ĺ a jin ¶umin, u masazumaaj a m…ô-r~…ĺa-ni-si-ja a tad…ômaw kuńß…ôni, dudu ¶ tu piasip, aw- ¶ow-tar~…ĺuaj a td…ômaw mu…ôn…ôŇčaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu iajaw nu * …ômaŇč katukuńß *.* …ômaŇč a mińß ¶aan, itawja tad…ômaw amin makaj nu ajzaaj a tuŇč-nan-ja miawas tu ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a saŇčaw atu pa ¶…ôna Ē~ °aj i baju a zaza mar~…ĺimad. imańßini ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kapur~…ĺita pinaaj ku sab…ôr~…ĺ…ôŇč nu mar~…ĺimadaj nu tad…ômaw ńßakaj mar~…ĺa ujni nu mińß ¶aan pakar~…ĺa tu ajaw nu ***** a mińß ¶aan. madj…ôdb…ôb…ô *******. ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ** aw- ¶ow tini i nutimur~…ĺan paŇčkiw nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, t…ôban nu timur~…ĺ baju atu in-tu a baju, izawaj ku nu aw- ¶ow tar~…ĺu atu ta-s-ma-nija a kasasubar~…ĺ. aw- ¶ow u baju amin ku tar~…ĺijuk, sawar~…ĺi timur~…ĺ sir~…ĺa…ôd tu ta-s-man a baju atu mar~…ĺab…ôr~…ĺaw tu niw-si-r~…ĺan, nuamisan sir~…ĺa…ôd tu ti-won baju atu to-r~…ĺj…ô-s a baju atu tuŇč-ti-won, masasupa…ôwaŇč ku in-tu-ni-si-ja atu pa-pu-ja-sin- ¶i nj…ô-ja. aw- ¶ow ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ta-jaŇč- ¶ow u tukus amin, pur~…ĺuŇč nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ ***.* …ômaŇč pin-baŇč tabakiaj a nikar~…ĺukan nisaŇča Ē~ °an a tuud patajza i nu tawan a kanatar~…ĺ, atu …ôn…ôm ku tabakiaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an a apuk a ba Ē~ °tu patańßar~…ĺ i zumaan a kanatar~…ĺ. mapaŇčaŇčan tu "mika ¶awaj i kur~…ĺur~…ĺ nu sizi, mika ¶aw i miba Ē~ °tuaj a kaziz…ôŇčan, mik…ô ¶ ku r~…ĺima tu ńßabajaj a kanatar~…ĺ". aw- ¶o a giŇčku, bisiwbajaj, atu mi…ôdapaj kar~…ĺamr~…ĺam satu ma ¶akat. namańßini, aow- ¶o nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj a kawaw u saajawaj i ńßamin nu kitakit u sakatur~…ĺu nu nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan nu sakańß…ônur~…ĺan nunisakaputaj, mir~…ĺiwkuaj a kawaw i aw- ¶ow kar~…ĺamkam sa ma ¶akat. zajńßan sar~…ĺuŇčan ku r~…ĺar~…ĺajan ńß…ôkar~…ĺ atu sakasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ tu kasatiman a aadup…ôn atu mur~…ĺaŇčawaj, ¶unus tu ka ¶akat nu k…ôzaj, aw- ¶ow mar~…ĺa u ¶ajaj kapawan a katajzan nu mir~…ĺiwkuaj. aŇčaŇčan a pir~…ĺiwkuan izaw ku piazińßan tu misaigiaj mudadiwaj nu sj…ô-r~…ĺi. sj…ô-r~…ĺi a minatu tabakiaj a saŇčaw, sj…ô-r~…ĺi a pi ¶…ôkur~…ĺan "timur~…ĺ paŇčkiw nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu sakatusa nu tar~…ĺakawaj a nipatiz…ôŇč" kim a dadipasan, ta-paw- ¶jaw, saamisan aj-ar~…ĺ a taku, mu-ar~…ĺ-p…ôn a piazińßan tu nar~…ĺimaan, u r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan nu j…ôn ¶umin a r~…ĺar~…ĺa Ē~ ° ka-ka-tu aiidaŇčan nu kanatar~…ĺ atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu j…ôn ¶umin wi-r~…ĺan- ¶i a tukuan. aw- ¶ow nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw u tuas sa **,** s…ô- ¶iaj nu mar~…ĺimadaj nu iŇč-kow. katuud ku makaj zumaaj a kanatar~…ĺ, aw- ¶ow atu am…ôr~…ĺika mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nu makaj zumaaj a kanatar~…ĺ nu mar~…ĺimadaj a tad…ômaw par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßatu pinaaj a kanatar~…ĺ, u sakatuudaj nu mar~…ĺimadaj nu kitakit. . r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan ** aw- ¶ow mir~…ĺir~…ĺid nu zumaaj a ńß…ôkar~…ĺ, ńßina amadajum mapat…ôr~…ĺa ¶ mar~…ĺa r~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺik…ônan a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, sa ¶a u aw- ¶ow ńßajmaw sa tu itizaaj a kanatar~…ĺ u pir~…ĺijas nu iŇč-kow, imańßini u aw- ¶ow mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺaj tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan maka **** a mińß ¶aan nu tańß…ôkar~…ĺ, mańßi ¶ańßi ¶aaj anar~…ĺimaan, nisur~…ĺtan dadiw atu ka ¶udu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺ tu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan mitur~…ĺ…ôs tu kitakit, aw- ¶ow a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu j…ôn ¶umin atu mi ¶uk…ôr~…ĺaj nu ow- ¶ow a ir~…ĺu ¶ nu sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a tad…ômaw mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu ku r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, i zuma a kitizaan masa "r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nu aw- ¶ow".
S.FORM: == kakilimad == Aw-tali-ya lyen-pang "Ing a kamu Commonwealth of Australia" ngangan Aw-ta-li-yalin, "Aw-cow Australia, nipasaadidi' tu silit AU,AUS", u tiniay i nutimulan pangkiw nu hekal nu saamisan, tu nuwalian pangkiw nu hekal tu nuwalian a tatengilan hungti ku pahecekay tu hulic, lyen-pang-ce a kanatal. hamin nu kanatal tungus nu Ta-yang-cow "cayay ku cacayay a cow", uyni cow ku tabakiay a hekal, nuwalian pangkiw nu hekal sakatus nu ahebal atu hamin nu hekal tu sakaenem nu tabakiay a kanatal. (Australia,ÁłģŚĮęÁāļAU,AUS), . Aw-co tiniay i Ta-lu i kasumamadan izaw ku tademaw mueneng mauzip, nika katukuh 17 a se-ci nu pabalungaay a ziday kya maazi makay likut mitules tu syakay a tademaw, 18 se-ci sazikuzay a mihcaan malingatu mala u midebungay nu Ing-kow atu pipaydangan a kitizaan nu malubuay, zikuz zayhan maazih ku siacaay a ba'tuan mala u mabulayay a tademaw, makakadum tu mahiniay a kawaw. keyzayan, miba'tu milungad tu sakasilacul, pahabay tu aadupen, pahabay tu micucu'ay aadipen, miliwkuay atu pasubana'ayay a kawaw uyni a kanatal ku hecek nu nilaculan, zuma "mikalic i kulul nu sizi" atu "muenge i kazizeng nu miba'tuay" u kamu nu kanatal. Aw-cow a Yincumi pasu tusa ku katuuday a binacadan, Aw-cu Ta-lu "atu pasu Ta-s-ma-ni-ya a subal ilabu ililis nu subal" a Yincumin atu Tuw-lye-s bayu a subal a Yincumin, u masazumaay a Me-la-ni-si-ya a tademaw kuheni, duduc tu piasip, Aw-cow-Taluay a tdemaw muenengay malingatu iayaw nu 5 emang katukuh 6.5 emang a mihcaan, itawya tademaw amin makay nu ayzaay a Tung-nan-ya miawas tu hekalay a sangaw atu pacena'ay i bayu a zaza malimad. imahini caay henay kapulita pinaay ku sabeleng nu malimaday nu tademaw hakay mala uyni nu ayzaay a ziday nu Aw-cow a tuas nu Yencumin. A-mu-tiay "Madjedbebe u pilimekan a ungcung nu Aw-co nu kasumamadanay a pihibangan nu tademaw. maazih ku nu sumamaday a ukuk nu tademaw, u mihcaan pakala tu ayaw nu 41000 a mihcaan. Madjedbebe 41000ŚĻīŚČć. hekal ŚúįÁźÜ Aw-cow tini i nutimulan pangkiw nu hekal, teban nu timul bayu atu In-tu a bayu, izaway ku nu Aw-cow talu atu Ta-s-ma-niya a kasasubal. Aw-cow u bayu amin ku taliyuk, sawali timul silaed tu Ta-s-man a bayu atu malabelaw tu Niw-si-lan, nuamisan silaed tu Ti-won bayu atu To-lye-s a bayu atu Tung-ti-won, masasupaewang ku In-tu-ni-si-ya atu Pa-pu-ya-sin-ci nye-ya. Aw-cow macalap ku Ta-yang-cow u tukus amin, pulung nu hekal 769.2 emang pin-bang kung-li. likelikenan atu pangkiw nu likelikenan u hekal katukuh 340 emang pin-bang kung-li, pulung nu hekal macalap ku 445% pesen. masaliyuk nu bay uku Ow-co, matelek ku tukus atu bayu, u tanayu' katukuh 36,735 kung-li. demiad satipan nu talakaway a buyu' atu tukusay a likeikenan tungusay u akuti'ay ku demkiad nu likelikenan, makedal caay kaudad, kaudad nu mihcaan 100-300 kung-li dada', saamisan tungusay u akuti'ay a nalinahuwan, kaudad nu mihcaan 1,000-2,300 kung-li, u sayadahay a kakitizaan nu hamin nu kanatal, uzuma tungusay u akuti'ay,nuwalian a sin-ing-lan a byu' u timul tungusay tatudungay a akuti' u kilakilang, u kaudad nu mihcaan 500~1,200 kung-li. palalecad tu akuti' nu paymicaan saamisan 27‚ĄÉ, nutimulan 14‚ĄÉ Aw-cow hatu mapangkiw ku makedalay anucaay u bukebukelalan, nika u hekal yadah ku mauzipay, pasu makay talakaway a apuyu'ay nu mulangaway katukuh caledesay a kilakilangan, hamin nu hekalay 17 ku micidekay nu mauzipay u sakayadahay a kanatal. Aw-cow itiza yadah ku mitekeday nu mauzipay, lalekalan nu kasumamadanay nu Aw-cu-ta-lu, hekalan mahiza muteneng tu, atu pihaceng ku kikasumad nu demiad. Aw-co nu timul pangkiw hekal a kyezay u samacakatay a kanatal, nu kitakit sacakatay a keyzay nu kanatal, 2023 a m ihcaan, Aw-cow a nipalumaan nipahabayan pulung nu aca pakala tu 1.7 emang ok'k ku kalisiw, palalecad tu nu tademaw a nipaluman nipahabayan u aca apakala tu 6,5 emang ku kalisiw. u Aw-cow sa i kitakit nu cacay a bataan u tabakiay a nikalukan nisanga'an a tuud patayza i nu tawan a kanatal, atu enem ku tabakiay a nisanga'an a apuk a ba'tu patahal i zumaan a kanatal. mapangangan tu "mikacaway i kulul nu sizi, mikacaw i miba'tuay a kazizengan, mikec ku lima tu habayay a kanatal". Aw-co a gingku, bisiwbayay, atu miedapay kalamlam satu macakat. namahini, Aow-co nu miliwkuay a kawaw u saayaway i hamin nu kitakit u sakatulu nu nilaculan nu sakahenulan nunisakaputay, miliwkuay a kawaw i Aw-cow kalamkam sa macakat. zayhan salungan ku lalayan hekal atu sakasilacul tu kasatiman a aadupen atu mulangaway, cunus tu kacakat nu keyzay, Aw-cow mala u cayay kapawan a katayzan nu miliwkuay. angangan a piliwkuan izaw ku piazihan tu misaigiay mudadiway nu Sye-li. Sye-li a minatu tabakiay a sangaw, Sye-li a picekulan "timul pangkiw nu hekal nu sakatusa nu talakaway a nipatizeng" kim a dadipasan, Ta-paw-cyaw, saamisan Ay-al a taku, Mu-al-pen a piazihan tu nalimaan, u lalekalan nu Yencumin a lala' Ka-ka-tu aiidangan nu kanatal atu lalangawan nu Yencumin Wi-lan-ci a tukuan. Aw-cow nu salengacay a tademaw u tuas sa 19,20 se-ciay nu malimaday nu Ing-kow. katuud ku makay zumaay a kanatal, Aw-cow atu Ameylika malecad nu makay zumaay a kanatal nu malimaday a tademaw palalecad hatu pinaay a kanatal, u sakatuuday nu malimaday nu kitakit. . lalangawan śĖáŚĆĖ Aw-cow mililid nu zumaay a hekal, hina amadayum mapatelac mala likelikenan a lalangawan, saca u Aw-cow haymaw sa tu itizaay a kanatal u piliyas nu Ing-kow, imahini u Aw-cow micukelay tu lalangawan maka 1960 a mihcaan nu tahekal, mahicahicaay analimaan, nisultan dadiw atu kacudu lalangawan atu micukel tu lalangawan mitules tu kitakit, Aw-cow a lalangawan nu Yencumin atu micukelay nu Ow-cow a iluc nu salengacay a tademaw malecad tu ku lalangawan, i zuma a kitizaan masa "lalangawan nu Aw-cow".
